notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Higashioka reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Isaac Paredes. Jake Burger to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Higashioka reached on error

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Braden Shewmake. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.
